name: Suspended Payload Sway Analysis
description: A robotics engineer at a steel mill is optimizing an automated overhead crane that transports vats of liquid metal. If the crane accelerates or stops too abruptly, the suspended vat swings dangerously. Programmatically build a 1D gantry crane with a passive suspended pendulum (length L = 1.0 m) in CoppeliaSim. Execute a 2.0-meter horizontal translation using both an 'abrupt' and a 'smooth' velocity profile, recording simulation time, trolley X position, and revolute joint angle at >= 20 Hz for at least 8 simulated seconds per trial. Compute the maximum absolute sway angle for both trials and demonstrate a reduction in payload sway. Export the time-series data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sway_timeseries.csv (columns: trial_name, sim_time_s, trolley_x_m, sway_angle_deg) and the summary report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sway_report.json (fields: pendulum_length_m, abrupt_max_sway_deg, smooth_max_sway_deg, sway_reduction_pct).
